summary: Alertas Task Creation System Testing Complete: All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Dashboard Alertas Widget with 'Crear Tarea' functionality verified working. Both ITV and Mantenimiento tasks created and visible in Tareas page.
seed_data_creation: Tasks created from alerts during testing (ITV and Mantenimiento for Tractor John Deere 6120M)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Alertas task creation system fully verified. Dashboard widget shows 2 alerts with 'Tarea creada' indicators for both. Tasks visible in Tareas page with correct tipo_tarea=mantenimiento and prioridad (alta/media). All data-testids functional.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/alertas/resumen: PASSED - Returns 2 alerts (1 ITV vencida + 1 mantenimiento pendiente)
backend_endpoints.POST /api/alertas/crear-tarea (mantenimi: PASSED - Creates task with tipo_tarea=mantenimiento, prioridad=media
backend_endpoints.POST /api/alertas/crear-tarea (duplicate: PASSED - Returns success=false with existing tarea_id
backend_endpoints.GET /api/alertas/tareas-existentes: PASSED - Returns alert keys with active tasks
backend_endpoints.GET /api/tareas: PASSED - Shows tasks created from alerts with alerta_origen field

tareas_page.task_2: Revision mantenimiento - Tractor John Deere 6120M (pendiente, prioridad media, tipo Mantenimiento)
